properties.name: smd.event-store.scheduling.enabled
properties.description: Whether event store polling is enabled.

properties.name: smd.event-store.scheduling.initial-delay
properties.description: Delay before the first poll after startup.

properties.name: smd.event-store.scheduling.thread-pool-size
properties.description: Number of threads in the polling scheduler thread pool.

properties.name: smd.event-store.processing.max-retries
properties.description: Maximum number of retries before a failed event is abandoned.

properties.name: smd.event-store.processing.batch-size
properties.description: Number of events fetched per poll cycle.

properties.name: smd.event-store.processing.gap-timeout
properties.description: How long to wait for a gap in sequence numbers to fill before skipping.

properties.name: smd.event-store.processing.retry-backoff.strategy
properties.description: Backoff strategy for failed event retries.

properties.name: smd.event-store.processing.retry-backoff.fixed-delay
properties.description: Delay between retries when using the FIXED strategy.

properties.name: smd.event-store.processing.retry-backoff.initial-delay
properties.description: Initial delay for LINEAR and EXPONENTIAL strategies.

properties.name: smd.event-store.processing.retry-backoff.multiplier
properties.description: Multiplier applied per retry for the EXPONENTIAL strategy.

properties.name: smd.event-store.processing.retry-backoff.increment
properties.description: Delay increment per retry for the LINEAR strategy.

properties.name: smd.event-store.processing.retry-backoff.max-delay
properties.description: Upper bound on retry delay for LINEAR and EXPONENTIAL strategies.

values.description: Delay increases by a fixed increment per retry.
Delay increases by a multiplier per retry.
